subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Cause of God! Praise be to God, for thou hast become the means of the diffusion of radiance in Iraq. Mayest thou be ever aided by divine bounties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی امر الله الحمد لله در عراق سبب انتشار اشراق گشتی همیشه موفق بالطاف
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
